name: @claude-memory-kit/repo
description: Per-project, in-repo memory system for Claude Code. Monorepo root for development; published packages live under packages/.

scripts.test: node scripts/validate-test-ids.mjs && node scripts/validate-template.mjs && node scripts/validate-exit-doors.mjs && node scripts/validate-references.mjs && node scripts/validate-spawn-discipline.mjs && node scripts/validate-numbering-gaps.mjs && node scripts/validate-composition.mjs && node scripts/validate-platform-commands.mjs && node scripts/validate-doc-registry.mjs && vitest run
